info.name: Zoom meeting/
info.description:
Needs description.

Contact Support:
 Name: Zoom Developers
 Email: developer@zoom.us

urlencoded.description: (Required) Meeting host user ID. Can be any user under this account. Cannot be updated after creation.
(Required) Meeting topic. Max of 300 characters.

(Required) Meeting type: 1 means instant meeting (Only used for host to start it as soon as created). 2 means normal scheduled meeting. 3 means a recurring meeting with no fixed time. 8 means a recurring meeting with fixed time.
Meeting start time in ISO datetime format. For scheduled meeting and recurring meeting with fixed time. Should be UTC time, such as 2012-11-25T12:00:00Z.
Meeting duration (minutes). For scheduled meeting only.
Timezone to format start_time, like "America/Los_Angeles". For scheduled meeting only. For this parameter value please refer to the id value in timezone list JSON file.
Meeting password. Password may only contain the following characters: [a-z A-Z 0-9 @ - _
Recurrence Meeting Settings. For recurring meeting with fixed time only. See [Recurrence Object](#recurrence-object) for more details.
Registration required.

Registration type. 1 means Attendees register once and can attend any of the occurrences, 2 means Attendees need to register for each occurrence to attend, 3 means Attendees register once and can choose one or more occurrences to attend. For recurring meeting with fixed time only.
Join meeting before host start the meeting. Only for scheduled or recurring meetings.
Meeting start type. Can be "video" or "screen_share". (deprecated)
Start video when host join meeting.
Start video when participants join meeting.
Host meeting in China.
Host meeting in India.
Meeting audio options. Can be "both", "telephony", "voip".
Only signed-in users can join this meeting.
Only signed-in users with specified domains can join meetings.
Alternative hosts.
Alternative hosts IDs.
Use Personal Meeting ID. Only for scheduled meetings.
Automatically record type. Can be "local", "cloud" or "none".

request.description: Create a meeting on Zoom, return the created meeting URL

response.name: Success

urlencoded.description: (Required) Meeting host user ID. Can be any user under this account. Cannot be updated after creation.
(Required) Meeting topic. Max of 300 characters.

(Required) Meeting type: 1 means instant meeting (Only used for host to start it as soon as created). 2 means normal scheduled meeting. 3 means a recurring meeting with no fixed time. 8 means a recurring meeting with fixed time.
Meeting start time in ISO datetime format. For scheduled meeting and recurring meeting with fixed time. Should be UTC time, such as 2012-11-25T12:00:00Z.
Meeting duration (minutes). For scheduled meeting only.
Timezone to format start_time, like "America/Los_Angeles". For scheduled meeting only. For this parameter value please refer to the id value in timezone list JSON file.
Meeting password. Password may only contain the following characters: [a-z A-Z 0-9 @ - _
Recurrence Meeting Settings. For recurring meeting with fixed time only. See [Recurrence Object](#recurrence-object) for more details.
Registration required.

Registration type. 1 means Attendees register once and can attend any of the occurrences, 2 means Attendees need to register for each occurrence to attend, 3 means Attendees register once and can choose one or more occurrences to attend. For recurring meeting with fixed time only.
Join meeting before host start the meeting. Only for scheduled or recurring meetings.
Meeting start type. Can be "video" or "screen_share". (deprecated)
Start video when host join meeting.
Start video when participants join meeting.
Host meeting in China.
Host meeting in India.
Meeting audio options. Can be "both", "telephony", "voip".
Only signed-in users can join this meeting.
Only signed-in users with specified domains can join meetings.
Alternative hosts.
Alternative hosts IDs.
Use Personal Meeting ID. Only for scheduled meetings.
Automatically record type. Can be "local", "cloud" or "none".

response.body:
{
  "example": {
    "uuid": "unique_id",
    "start_url": "https://zoom.us/s/123456789?zak=xxxxxx",
    "join_url": "https://zoom.us/j/123456789",
    "created_at": "2012-11-25T12:00:00.000Z",
    "host_id": "unique_id",
    "topic": "Topic for this meeting",
    "type": 2,
    "option_jbh": false,
    "option_start_type": "video",
    "start_time": "2012-11-25T12:00:00.000Z",
    "duration": 30,
    "timezone": "America/Los_Angeles",
    "password": "123",
    "h323_password": "123456",
    "option_host_video": false,
    "option_participants_video": false,
    "option_audio": "both",
    "option_enforce_login": false,
    "option_enforce_login_domains ": "",
    "option_alternative_hosts": "",
    "status": 0
  }
}

request.description: Get a meeting on Zoom via meeting ID, return the meeting info.

response.name: Success

urlencoded.description: (Required) Meeting host user ID. Can be any user under this account.
(Required) Meeting ID.

response.body:
{
  "example": {
    "uuid": "unique_id",
    "host_id": "unique_id",
    "topic": "Zoom Meeting",
    "password": "",
    "h323_password": "",
    "status": 0,
    "option_jbh": false,
    "option_start_type": "video",
    "option_host_video": true,
    "option_participants_video": true,
    "option_cn_meeting": false,
    "option_enforce_login": false,
    "option_enforce_login_domains": "",
    "option_in_meeting": false,
    "option_audio": "both",
    "option_alternative_hosts": "",
    "option_use_pmi": false,
    "type": 8,
    "start_time": "",
    "duration": 0,
    "timezone": "Asia/Hong_Kong",
    "start_url": "https://www.zoom.us/s/123456789?zak=xxxxxx",
    "join_url": "https://www.zoom.us/j/123456789",
    "created_at": "2016-12-20T02:51:42.000Z",
    "occurrences": [
      {
        "occurrence_id": "1483210260000",
        "start_time": "2017-01-01T02:51:00.000Z",
        "duration": 60
      }
    ]
  }
}

urlencoded.description: (Required) Meeting host user ID. Can be any user under this account.
The amount of records returns within a single API call. Defaults to 30. Max of 300 meetings.
Current page number of returned records. Default to 1.

request.description: List all the scheduled meetings on Zoom.

response.name: Success

urlencoded.description: (Required) Meeting host user ID. Can be any user under this account.
The amount of records returns within a single API call. Defaults to 30. Max of 300 meetings.
Current page number of returned records. Default to 1.

response.body:

  "example": {
    "page_count": 5,
    "total_records": 235,

        "option_jbh": false,
        "option_start_type": "video",

        "option_participants_video": false,
        "option_audio": "both",
        "option_enforce_login": false,
        "option_enforce_login_domains ": "",

        "status": 0
      }
    ]
  }
}

urlencoded.description: (Required) A valid email address.
(Required) User’s first name.
(Required) Meeting ID.
(Required) User’s last name.
Address.
City.
Country. For this parameter value please refer to the id value in country list JSON file
Zip/Postal Code.
State/Province.
Phone.
Industry.
Organization.
Job Title.
Purchasing Time Frame, should be "Within a month", "1-3 months", "4-6 months", "More than 6 months", "No timeframe".
Role in Purchase Process, should be "Decision Maker", "Evaluator/Recommender", "Influencer", "Not involved".
Questions & Comments.
Custom Questions, should be JSON format: [{"title":"field_name1","value":"xxx"},{"title":"field_name2","value":"xxx"}].
Language setting of email. This value should be "en-US", "en", "zh-CN", "zh", "en-ES", "es", "fr-FR" or "fr".
Occurrence IDs, could get this value from Meeting Get API.

(Required) Meeting host user ID. Can be any user under this account. Used to retrieve a meeting, cannot be updated.

(Required) Meeting type: 1 means instant meeting (Only used for host to start it as soon as created). 2 means normal scheduled meeting. 3 means a recurring meeting with no fixed time. 8 means a recurring meeting with fixed time.
Meeting topic. Max of 300 characters.
Meeting start time in ISO datetime format. For scheduled meeting only. Should be UTC time, such as 2012-11-25T12:00:00Z.
Meeting duration (minutes). For scheduled meeting only.
Timezone to format start_time, like "America/Los_Angeles". For scheduled meeting only. For this parameter value please refer to the id value in timezone list JSON file.
Meeting password. Password may only contain the following characters: [a-z A-Z 0-9 @ - _
Recurrence Meeting Settings. For recurring meeting with fixed time only. See [Recurrence Object](#recurrence-object) for more details.
Registration required.

Registration type. 1 means Attendees register once and can attend any of the occurrences, 2 means Attendees need to register for each occurrence to attend, 3 means Attendees register once and can choose one or more occurrences to attend. For recurring meeting with fixed time only.
Join meeting before host start the meeting. Only for scheduled or recurring meetings.

Use Personal Meeting ID. Only for scheduled meetings.
Automatically record type. Can be "local", "cloud" or "none".
